response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive software development experience (14+ years) and some leadership roles (e.g., organizing workshops, contributing to team processes), he lacks direct experience in people management (only 2 years in technical leadership roles) and organizational change leadership (0 years). His background in developer tools is present but not deeply aligned with the mobile platform ecosystem or build systems/testing infrastructure. His strong technical skills and community contributions are notable, but the role requires stronger people-leadership and mobile-specific experience.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, and AI-agent infrastructure).
Strong technical expertise in developer tools, testing frameworks (e.g., Fluent-Asserts for D), and CI/CD pipelines.
Proven track record of open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, workshops).
concerns: Limited people management experience (only 2 years in technical leadership roles, no formal team management).
No direct experience leading organizational change or mobile-platform-specific developer tools.
Lacks hands-on experience with mobile platform ecosystems (e.g., Android/iOS build systems, testing infrastructure).
